title: bulbine angustifolia
intro: Bulbine angustifolia, also known as Yellow Lily or Red Hottentot, is a plant species that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bulbine angustifolia include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Bulbine angustifolia include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds, while the leaves and roots can also be dried and used as a powder for internal consumption.
